mapper.select: select id, conversation_id, user_id, role, status, unread_count, is_muted, is_pinned, last_read_message_id, joined_at, created_at, updated_at from cook_conversation_members where conversation_id = #{conversationId} and status = 'normal' order by role asc, joined_at asc, id asc

select cm.id, cm.conversation_id, cm.user_id, cm.role, cm.status, cm.unread_count, cm.is_muted, cm.is_pinned, cm.last_read_message_id, cm.joined_at, cm.created_at, cm.updated_at, u.nickname, u.avatar_url from `cook_groups` g inner join cook_conversation_members cm on cm.conversation_id = g.conversation_id and cm.status = 'normal' inner join cook_users u on u.id = cm.user_id and u.deleted_at is null where g.id = #{groupId} and g.deleted_at is null order by cm.role asc, cm.joined_at asc, cm.id asc
mapper.insert: insert into cook_conversation_members (conversation_id, user_id, role, status, joined_at) values (#{conversationId}, #{userId}, #{role}, #{status}, current_timestamp)
mapper.update: update cook_conversation_members set status = 'normal', role = #{role}, joined_at = current_timestamp, updated_at = current_timestamp where conversation_id = #{conversationId} and user_id = #{userId}

update cook_conversation_members set unread_count = 0, last_read_message_id = #{lastReadMessageId}, updated_at = current_timestamp where conversation_id = #{conversationId} and user_id = #{userId} and status = 'normal'

update cook_conversation_members
is_muted = #{muted}, is_pinned = #{pinned}, updated_at = current_timestamp
where conversation_id = #{conversationId} and user_id = #{userId} and status = 'normal'
update cook_conversation_members set status = 'left', unread_count = 0, updated_at = current_timestamp where conversation_id = #{conversationId} and user_id = #{userId} and status = 'normal'
